scenarios.description: parse(String html, String baseUri) with valid HTML and non-empty baseUri returns parsed Document
scenarios.expectedResult:
Document returned with .html() equal to '

Test

' and .baseUri() equal to 'http://example.com/'

scenarios.description: parse(String html, String baseUri) with null html throws IllegalArgumentException
parse(String html, String baseUri, Parser parser) with valid parser returns Document via parseInput
scenarios.expectedResult:
Document returned with .html() equal to '
OK
' and .baseUri() equal to 'base'
pseudocode:
String html = "
OK
"; String baseUri = "base"; Parser p = Parser.xmlParser();

scenarios.description: parse(String html, Parser parser) with empty html yields empty Document body
scenarios.expectedResult: Document returned with empty body html and baseUri == ''

scenarios.description: parse(String html) with fragment HTML returns Document with body containing fragment
scenarios.expectedResult: Document returned with body html 'F' and baseUri == ''

scenarios.description: parse(File file, String charsetName, String baseUri) with valid UTF-8 file returns Document
scenarios.expectedResult:
Document returned with html containing '

Hi

' and baseUri equal to provided
pseudocode:
File f = createTempFile("test.html","

Hi

"); String cs = "UTF-8"; String base = "http://b/";

scenarios.description: parse(File file, String charsetName) with null charsetName defaults to BOM/meta detection
scenarios.precondition:
create temp file with '

X

' without BOM; charsetName=null
scenarios.expectedResult:
Document returned with html containing '

X

' and baseUri equal to file.getAbsolutePath()
pseudocode:
File f = createTempFile("a.html","

X

"); String cs = null;

scenarios.description: parse(InputStream in, String charsetName, String baseUri) with ByteArrayInputStream and custom baseUri
scenarios.precondition: InputStream is ByteArrayInputStream of '1'; no mocks
scenarios.expectedResult: Document returned with html containing '1' and baseUri equal to provided
pseudocode: InputStream in = new ByteArrayInputStream("1".getBytes()); String cs = "UTF-8"; String base = "http://u/";

scenarios.description: parse(URL url, int timeoutMillis) with valid http URL returns Document
scenarios.precondition: use localhost test server responding 'OK'; no mocks
pseudocode: URL url = new URL("http://localhost:8080/test"); int timeout = 5000;

scenarios.description: parse(String html, String baseUri) with empty baseUri and relative link preserves relative when Safelist.preserveRelativeLinks true
scenarios.expectedResult: clean returns 'X' when preserveRelativeLinks true
pseudocode: String html = "X"; String base=""; Safelist s = Safelist.relaxed().preserveRelativeLinks(true);
